understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the gem tile marked '+' within the step limit while avoiding spike tiles
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement uses directional actions (MOVE_UP/DOWN/LEFT/RIGHT) to change position; gravity is a state (currently DOWN) that affects movement behavior; CLICK removes clickable tiles like (5,19) and may alter paths/gravity; hazards (spikes) end the run on contact; attempts are limited with restarts on failure

history.summary: Level 1 attempt 1 turn 6: MOVE_LEFT | The goal is at [3,7]. Clickable breakable blocks at rows 9,12,15-17,19 can be clicked but first need to reach right-side clickable tiles or find path up. Currently at [4,23] with left/right moves on same y=23. Gravity is DOWN so falling not possible until up platforms. Need to move toward clickable areas or find vertical path. From [4,23] MOVE_LEFT keeps options open.

history.summary: Level 1 attempt 2 turn 12: MOVE_RIGHT | Moving upward is urgent because the rising platform will crush the player in 6 moves. From the current position [3, 23], the immediate right and left targets are both at y=23, so I need to find and exploit the only open passage in column 7 (passage true). The first step should be to get to that column by moving right repeatedly toward x=7. Once there, gravity will allow upward movement. The goal [3,7] is still higher up, so conserving horizontal steps while clearing upward path is critical.
